app.name: JaundiCare
topbar.subtitle: Kulawar jaundice ga sabon jinjiri
dashboard.hero_tag: Tallafin gaggawa ga uwa da sabon jinjiri
dashboard.hero_title: Yi gwaji da wuri. Dauki mataki da wuri. Kwantar da hankali.
dashboard.hero_text: JaundiCare tana taimaka wa iyaye su gane alamun jaundice na jariri da wuri, fahimtar alamun hatsari, da sanin lokacin da za a sa ido, sake gwaji, ko neman magani a rana daya.
dashboard.no_profile: Ba a samar da bayanin jariri ba tukuna
dashboard.create_profile_hint: Samar da bayani don lissafin shekarun jariri kai tsaye.
dashboard.no_screening: Ba a yi gwaji ba tukuna.
dashboard.check.3: Duba tafin hannu da na kafa.
dashboard.check.4: Lura da yadda yake shan nono da farkawarsa sosai.
dashboard.warning.3: Jiki a mace ko yawan bacci
dashboard.warning.4: Fitsari mai launin duhu ko kashi mai kalar toka
profile.title: Bayanin jariri
profile.text: Ajiye bayanan jaririnka sau daya. App din zai yi amfani da su don lissafin shekarunsa don gwaji.
profile.empty: Ba a ajiye bayanin jariri ba tukuna.
screening.title: Fom din gwajin jariri
screening.text: Idan an ajiye bayanin jariri, za a cika awannin haihuwa kai tsaye.
screening.age_helper: Ana iya cika wannan kai tsaye daga bayanin jariri da aka ajiye.
screening.state_helper: Ana amfani da wannan idan ba a samu damar sanin wurin da kake ba.
screening.use_location: Yi amfani da wurin da nake yanzu
screening.location_not_set: Ba a saita wuri ba tukuna.
screening.image_helper: Yi amfani da hasken rana idan zai yiwu. Maida hankali kan fuska da idanu.
signs.floppy: Jiki a mace ko yawan bacci
signs.first24h: An ga launin rawaya a cikin awanni 24 na farko
signs.yellow_gums: Cikin baki ko dasashi sun yi rawaya
signs.yellow_palms: Tafin hannu ko tafin kafa sun yi rawaya
signs.darker_skin: Jariri mai launin fata mai duhu
result.title: Sakamakon gwaji
result.empty: Tura fom din don ganin sakamakon.
result.what_next: Abin da za a yi na gaba
history.title: Tarihin gwaji
history.text: Duba sakamakon gwajin baya don ganin yadda canji ya samu.
education.title: Ilimantarwa
care.title: Jagoran Kulawa
common.no_facility: Babu asibitin da aka bada shawara tukuna.
common.location_unsupported: Wannan na'urar ba ta goyon bayan gano wuri.
common.location_unavailable: Ba a iya samun wuri ba. Zaka iya saita jiharka da kanka.
common.request_failed: Ba mu iya kammala bukatar gwajin ba.
next.urgent.1: Tafi asibiti ko sashin kulawar gaggawa na jarirai yanzu.
next.urgent.2: Ci gaba da ba jariri nono idan zai yiwu yayin neman taimako.
next.urgent.3: Kada ka yi jinkiri idan jariri yana da wahalar tashi, jikinsa ya mace, ko ba ya shan nono sosai.
next.same_day.1: Shirya ganin likita ko ungozoma a yau dinnan.
next.same_day.2: Ci gaba da ba jariri nono akai-akai.
next.same_day.3: Duba idanu, dasashi, tafin hannu, da tafin kafa yayin jiran ganin likita.
next.recheck.1: Sake duba jariri nan kusa, musamman a cikin hasken rana.
next.recheck.2: Lura da idanu masu rawaya, rashin shan nono, ko yawan bacci.
next.recheck.3: Nemi shawara a rana daya idan har yanzu kana da damuwa.
next.monitor.1: Ci gaba da ba jariri nono akai-akai.
next.monitor.2: Ci gaba da lura da idanu, dasashi, tafin hannu, da tafin kafa.
next.monitor.3: Nemi shawara idan jariri ya fara wahalar tashi, ya daina shan nono sosai, ko ya kara yin rawaya.
edu.what_is.title: Menene Jaundice?
edu.what_is.body: Jaundice tana faruwa ne lokacin da sinadarin 'bilirubin' ya yi yawa a jikin jariri. Yana sa idanu, dasashi, fata, ko tafin hannu su yi rawaya.
edu.check.title: Yadda zaka duba jaririnka
edu.check.2: Daga leben baki ka duba dasashinsa.
edu.check.3: Duba tafin hannunsa da na kafa.
edu.check.4: Lura da yadda yake shan nono da farkawarsa.
edu.dark_skin.title: Gane jaundice ga jarirai masu launin fata mai duhu
edu.dark_skin.body: Gane jaundice na iya yin wuya a fatar da take da duhu. Duba idanu, dasashi, da tafin hannu. Lura da yadda yake bacci da shan nono.
edu.what_to_do.title: Abin da iyaye ya kamata su yi
edu.what_to_do.2: Sa ido sosai a kwanakin farko bayan haihuwa.
edu.what_to_do.3: Yi amfani da wannan manhaja lokacin da kake da damuwa.
edu.what_to_do.4: Nemi taimakon likita yau dinnan idan ka ga alamun hatsari.
edu.what_not_to_do.title: Abin da bai kamata ka yi ba
edu.what_not_to_do.1: Kada ka yi biris da rashin shan nono ko yawan bacci.
edu.what_not_to_do.2: Kada ka jinkirta ganin likita idan kana tsoron wani abu.
edu.what_not_to_do.3: Kada ka dogara da hasken rana kadai a matsayin magani.
edu.what_not_to_do.4: Kada ka dauka cewa jaundice koyaushe ba ta da illa.
edu.urgent.title: Yaushe za a nemi taimakon gaggawa
edu.urgent.1: Yin rawaya a cikin awanni 24 na farko
edu.urgent.5: Fitsari mai duhu ko kashi mai launin toka
care.feeding.title: Tallafin shan nono
care.feeding.body: Yawan shan nono yana taimakawa wajen fitar da bilirubin daga jikin jariri.
care.feeding.2: Lura da yadda yake tsotsar nono
care.feeding.3: Nemi taimako da wuri idan jariri ya daina shan nono
care.mother.title: Abin da uwa za ta iya yi
care.mother.1: Duba jariri duk lokacin da zai sha nono
care.mother.2: Duba idanu da dasashi a cikin haske mai kyau
care.mother.3: Nemi taimako da wuri idan ka ga wani abu ba daidai ba
care.mother.4: Halarci duk ranakun ganin likita bayan an sallame ku
care.maternal.title: Tallafin uwa bayan haihuwa
care.maternal.body: Uwaye ma suna bukatar tallafin samun lafiya. Manufarmu ita ce rage dadewa a asibiti ta hanyar gano matsaloli da wuri.
care.nutrition.title: Abinci ga uwa
care.nutrition.1: Sha ruwa sosai don jikinka ya bushe
care.nutrition.2: Ci abinci mai gina jiki akai-akai
care.nutrition.3: Kada ki tsallake abinci yayin shayarwa
care.nutrition.4: Huta duk lokacin da kika samu dama
chw.title: Yanayin Kulawa na Al'umma
chw.intro: Tsarin ma'aikacin lafiya na al'umma don taimaka wa iyaye wajen gwajin jaundice da tunatarwa.
chw.actions.title: Matakai na sauri
chw.followup.title: Jerin abubuwan duba bayan haihuwa
chw.followup.day1: Rana ta 1: Duba shan nono, farkawa, da fitsari.
chw.followup.day2: Rana ta 2-3: Duba idanu, dasashi, da tafin kafa don rawaya.
chw.followup.day7: Rana ta 7: Sake duba shan nono da nauyin jariri.
chw.followup.day14: Rana ta 14: Turawa zuwa babban asibiti idan rawayar ba ta tafi ba.
chw.referral.title: Hanyar tura mara lafiya
chw.risk.title: Abin da ma'aikata ya kamata su ba fifiko
chw.risk.1: Jaundice a cikin awanni 24 na farko.
chw.risk.2: Rashin shan nono tare da rawaya.
chw.risk.3: Wahalar tashi, jiki a mace, ko fitsari mai duhu.
chw.risk.4: Jarirai masu duhu inda rawayar ba ta saurin bayyana a fata.
chw.alignment.title: Tallafin kulawar sabon jinjiri a al'umma
chw.alignment.body: An tsara wannan ne don iyaye da ma'aikatan lafiya don sa ido da wuri.
reminder.title: Tunatarwa
reminder.text: Shawarwarin tunatarwa dangane da shekarun jariri da hadarin jaundice.
reminder.empty: Samar da bayanin jariri don ganin tunatarwa.
reminder.day1: Rana ta 1: Duba shan nono da fitsari.
reminder.day2: Rana ta 2–3: Duba idanu da tafin hannu don rawaya.
reminder.day7: Rana ta 7: Duba yadda yake shan nono da nauyi.
reminder.day14: Rana ta 14: Nemi likita idan jaundice ta dade.
voice.title: Jagoran Murya
voice.text: Karanta jagoran jaundice na jariri ga iyaye.
voice.unsupported: Wannan browser din ba ta goyon bayan jagoran murya.
voice.script: Jaundice na sabon jinjiri na iya zama hatsari idan ba a gane ta da wuri ba. Duba idanun jaririnka, dasashinsa, da tafin kafa ko sun yi rawaya. Lura da shan nono da farkawarsa. Idan jariri yana da wahalar tashi, jikinsa ya mace, ko ya yi rawaya a ranar farko, tafi asibiti maza-maza.
trust.title: Wannan abin taimaka wa gwaji ne kawai.
trust.body: Ba zai maye gurbin likita, ungozoma, ko ma'aikacin lafiya ba.
parent.message.urgent: Tafi da jaririnka asibiti yanzu. Kada ka yi jinkiri. Wannan sakamakon yana bukatar taimakon likita na gaggawa a yau dinnan.
parent.message.same_day: Yana da kyau likita ko ma'aikacin lafiya ya duba jaririnka a yau dinnan. Don Allah kada ka jira har sai gobe.
parent.message.monitor: Jaririnka yana da kyau a halin yanzu. Ci gaba da ba shi nono akai-akai, sannan ka lura da idanu ko fata idan sun yi rawaya, sannan ka sake gwaji idan ka ga wani canji.
urgent_parent: Tafi da jaririnka asibiti yanzu. Kada ka yi jinkiri. Wannan sakamakon yana bukatar taimakon likita na gaggawa a yau dinnan.
same_day_parent: Yana da kyau likita ko ma'aikacin lafiya ya duba jaririnka a yau dinnan. Don Allah kada ka jira har sai gobe.
recheck_parent: Don Allah sake duba jaririnka nan ba da dadewa ba. Ka lura da rawaya a idanu, gum, tafin hannu ko kafa, cin abinci mara kyau, ko barci mai yawa. Nemi shawara a wannan rana idan har dai damuwa ta ci gaba.
monitor_parent: Jaririnka yana da kyau a halin yanzu. Ci gaba da ba shi nono akai-akai, sannan ka lura da idanu ko fata idan sun yi rawaya, sannan ka sake gwaji idan ka ga wani canji.
amber_uncertain_reason: Alamu suna nuna damuwa, amma sakamakon hoton bai bayyana ba. Ana bada shawara a sake duba ko ganin likita a yau.
amber_weak_reason: Alamu suna nuna damuwa kuma sakamakon hoton bai isa ya ba da kwanciyar hankali ba. Ana bada shawara a sake duba ko ganin likita a yau.
urgent_reason_image: Hoton gwaji yana nuna yiwuwar jaundis. Ana bada shawara a ganin likita a wannan rana.
uncertain_reason: Sakamakon hoton bai bayyana ba. Don Allah sake duba nan ba da dadewa ba kuma nemi shawara idan damuwa ta ci gaba.
weak_normal_reason: Sakamakon hoton bai isa ya ba da kwanciyar hankali ba. Don Allah ci gaba da kula sosai kuma nemi shawara idan alamu suka bayyana.
